gaps.title: Queue is one unconstrained weighted sum
gaps.closureRule: QueueRankPlan freezes lexicographic precedence, within-tier urgency, fairness merge, and stable tie-break rules separately.

gaps.title: Reviewer fit can rewrite canonical order
gaps.closureRule: QueueAssignmentSuggestionSnapshot is downstream-only and may not rewrite ordinals or explanation payloads from QueueRankSnapshot.

gaps.title: Starvation promises survive overload
gaps.closureRule: rho_crit and rho_guard now govern overload_critical posture and suppress fairness promises when critical utilization breaches the guard.

gaps.title: Duplicate review is inferred from queue proximity
gaps.closureRule: DuplicateReviewSnapshot renders from DuplicateCluster, DuplicatePairEvidence, and DuplicateResolutionDecision rather than row adjacency or raw heuristics.

gaps.title: Same-request attach, replay collapse, and duplicate review are interchangeable
gaps.closureRule: IdempotencyRecord owns replay, DuplicateResolutionDecision owns attach or separate outcomes, and DuplicateCluster owns review-safe ambiguity.

gaps.title: Patient reply windows are client timers
gaps.closureRule: MoreInfoReplyWindowCheckpoint is the sole authority for due state, reminder eligibility, late-review grace, and expiry posture.

gaps.title: Multiple active more-info loops can coexist
gaps.closureRule: Replacement cycles supersede the older checkpoint, cancel old reminders, revoke reply grants, and preserve older history as superseded.

gaps.title: Late, expired, superseded, and repair-blocked replies are inferred later
gaps.closureRule: MoreInfoResponseDisposition now classifies the reply before evidence assimilation and re-safety.
